169.lore: During a covert operation, Sara found herself nearly encircled by flanking enemies. In a split second, she spotted a vulnerability in their formation and launched a preemptive strike, successfully breaking through the siege. This pivotal moment eradicated her deep-seated insecurities, drastically elevating her battlefield awareness and making her increasingly bold in combat. In the Star City campaign, she repeatedly utilized stealth to close in on enemies and initiate devastating ambushes. To complement Sara's evolved tactical approach, Meowzilla and Dr. Gero developed and upgraded an all-new assault vehicle for her, "Awoo". Today, Sara handles the reconnaissance, while Awoo brings the firepower.

172.lore:
Her bond and training with the Enigma Beasts significantly bolstered Nova's strength. Not only did she claim the championship at the latest combat tournament, but she also shattered Maximo's record.
Eager to share the good news with her beast companions, she arrived only to find a scene of chaos: people fleeing in terror from a stampede of berserk Enigma Beasts. This time, Nova did not turn and run. Her body reacted instinctively, resonating with a strange power. Runes flashed in her pupils, instantly covering her body and radiating outward as a gale-force wind swirled around her. In the next moment, the opposing herd calmed down as if sedated, returning to normal.

174.lore: Facing Lee Yewon's relentless precision volley, Ella's world narrowed down entirely to her bow and arrow. With defeat looming just inches away, she held her breath and honed her senses. Instead of fixating on her target, she shifted her focus to the flight paths of the incoming arrows. Time seemed to slow, and vivid, gray trajectories materialized in the air before her eyes! Guided by this surreal instinct, her arrow slipped silently from the bowstring, riding the anticipated trajectory to cleave Yewon's incoming shaft perfectly in two. Ella stared in disbelief at the back of her hand, where delicate, glowing green patterns resembling leafy vines were slowly fading away...

234.lore: The fan, a cherished heirloom of Shen Suyu's family, was forged from a crystal brimming with Enigma. As Enigma surged across the land, Suyu persistently attempted to merge her energy with the fan, yet the key always eluded her—an uncharacteristic source of anxiety for someone so composed. During a fierce battle aboard the Starship, the cabin she was guarding came under heavy fire. Suddenly, the fan erupted with brilliant light, its surface weaving with mysterious patterns. Suyu felt a surge of energy within her body, resonating with the fan like never before. As the skirmish raged outside, the haunting memory of the Hua Fleet's destruction resurfaced in her mind. Her energy poured into the fan like a burst dam. Following a heaven-piercing pillar of flame, her cabin was safely defended.

239.lore: After joining SMG, Lophy sought refuge from the ravages of war by diving into the Deep Sea, finding solace in the abyss. However, during an underwater clash between a sperm whale and a giant squid, his curiosity got the better of him. Recklessly approaching the skirmish, he was struck by the whale's tail fin and swept into a massive undercurrent. When he awoke, the sight of an ancient shipwreck and rocks inscribed with glowing runes made him realize he had stumbled upon the ruins of the lost civilization he had been searching for. To his astonishment, strange, luminous patterns now adorned his own body. By the time he fully regained his senses, Lophy found himself drifting peacefully on the ocean's surface.

333.lore: Cama's burst state was one of the earliest phenomena Dr. Gero researched, leading her to participate in the new "Hyper Awakening" project. Unlike other awakened individuals, Cama's transformation is highly manageable. Instrument data revealed that upon entering her awakened state, her physical capabilities skyrocket, accompanied by periodic fluctuations in her energy levels. Consequently, Dr. Gero designed a customized weapon for her: Energy Cannon. This firearm stores her energy at its peak, guaranteeing a stable and devastating output in all her future battles.

334.lore: Surviving numerous close calls in the Monster Domain convinced Jett that he needed a serious gear upgrade. Drawing inspiration from Titan Gear, Dr. Gero drafted a comprehensive modification plan. During a wind tunnel test, Jett nearly lost control in the gale-force winds. In a sudden flash of insight, he sensed the shape of the airflow and instinctively adjusted his posture to move with it, rather than fighting the air pressure. He had truly mastered aerodynamics and gravity! It wasn't until the system chimed "Danger Cleared" that he realized he had just survived a life-or-death trial.
